creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to iron.udjin from comment #7)
Non standart options:
BACKUP=bopt
ALWAYS_SCRUB_DISTFILES=dopt

I sadly have no experience using portmaster. The port builds just fine using `make`, and I can verify that it builds fine using poudriere. There seems to be something fishy with portmaster. How about using portmaster without the non standard options?
